get_password: SELECT password from users WHERE user_id = %s
get_user: SELECT group_id, user_id, name from users WHERE user_id = %s

groups.get_groups: SELECT group_id, group_name, status FROM groups WHERE group_id > 0
groups.update_group: UPDATE groups SET group_name = %s, status = %s, modifier = %s, modified_at = NOW() WHERE group_id = %s

devices.get_devices: SELECT device_id, device_name, status, version, last_login_at FROM devices WHERE group_id = %s AND device_id > 0
devices.insert_device: INSERT INTO devices(group_id, device_name, status, creator) VALUES(%s, %s, %s, %s)
devices.update_device: UPDATE devices SET device_name = %s, status = %s, modifier = %s, modified_at = NOW() WHERE device_id = %s

schedules.get_schedule_groups: SELECT sg.group_id, sg.schedule_id, sg.name, sg.year, sg.month, sg.day_of_week, sg.day, sg.hour, sg.minute, sg.second, sg.is_error_stop, sg.status, sg.target_device, d.device_name FROM schedule_group sg JOIN devices d ON d.device_id = sg.target_device WHERE sg.group_id = %s AND sg.schedule_id > 0
schedules.update_schedule: UPDATE schedule_group SET group_id = %s, name = %s, year = %s, month = %s, day_of_week = %s, day = %s, hour = %s, minute = %s, second = %s, is_error_stop = %s, status = %s, target_device = %s, modifier = %s, modified_at = NOW() WHERE schedule_id = %s;
schedules.get_devices: SELECT device_id, device_name FROM devices WHERE group_id = %s AND device_id >= 0

tasks.insert_schedule_detail: INSERT INTO schedule_detail (detail_id, schedule_name, schedule_id, year, month, day_of_week, day, hour, minute, second, is_error_stop, sequence, retry_count, status, creator) VALUES (UNHEX(REPLACE(%s, '-', '')), %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
tasks.insert_task: INSERT INTO task_detail (detail_id, command, task_type, archive_type, source_path, error_on_missing_source, destination_path, date_format, target_date_format, destination_date_format, house_keep_days, creator) VALUES (UNHEX(REPLACE(%s, '-', '')), %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
tasks.update_schedule_detail: UPDATE schedule_detail SET schedule_name=%s, schedule_id=%s, year=%s, month=%s, day_of_week=%s, day=%s, hour=%s, minute=%s, second=%s, is_error_stop=%s, sequence=%s, retry_count=%s, status=%s, modifier=%s, modified_at=NOW() WHERE detail_id=UNHEX(REPLACE(%s, '-', ''))
tasks.update_task: UPDATE task_detail SET command=%s, task_type=%s, archive_type=%s, source_path=%s, error_on_missing_source=%s, destination_path=%s, date_format=%s, target_date_format=%s, destination_date_format=%s, house_keep_days=%s, modifier=%s, modified_at=NOW() WHERE detail_id=UNHEX(REPLACE(%s, '-', ''))

manual_execution.get_manual_execution: SELECT sg.name, sd.schedule_name, me.manual_id, me.is_immediate, me.schedule_datetime, me.status, CASE WHEN me.status in ('active','wait') THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS edit_enable FROM manual_execution me JOIN schedule_detail sd ON sd.detail_id = me.detail_id JOIN schedule_group sg ON sg.schedule_id = sd.schedule_id ORDER BY me.manual_id DESC
manual_execution.update_manual_execution: UPDATE manual_execution SET is_immediate = %s, schedule_datetime = %s, status = %s, modifier = %s, modified_at = NOW() WHERE manual_id = %s
manual_execution.update_abandon_manual_execution: UPDATE manual_execution SET status = %s, modifier = %s, modified_at = NOW() WHERE manual_id = %s
